title: Fast Sand Smelting DATA PACK
description: This data pack let you put sand in the blast furnace to make glass faster
body: Are you tired of waiting for sand to smelt to get glass? Well, with my data pack, you can smelt sand to make glass in blast furnace. So it's gonna be faster and your glass projects will speed up with this data pack. Avaible for Forge and Neoforge [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-sand-smelting)
